examples.title: Algorithm: Wallet Generation
examples.description: Generate a new wallet with public and private keys
examples.code:
ALGORITHM GenerateWallet
INPUT: None
OUTPUT: public_key, private_key

BEGIN
 // Generate a random private key
 private_key = GenerateRandomPrivateKey()
 // Derive the public key from the private key
 public_key = DerivePublicKey(private_key)
 // Return the public and private keys
 RETURN public_key, private_key
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic steps for generating a new wallet with public and private keys.

examples.title: Python: Wallet Generation
examples.description: Generate a new wallet with public and private keys using Python
examples.code:
import ecdsa
import hashlib

# Generate a random private key
private_key = ecdsa.SigningKey.generate(curve=ecdsa.SECP256k1)

# Derive the public key from the private key
public_key = private_key.get_verifying_key()

# Print the public and private keys
print('Public Key:', public_key.to_string().hex())
print('Private Key:', private_key.to_string().hex())
examples.explanation: This Python code generates a new wallet with public and private keys using the ecdsa library.
